title: Errors — CRITICAL-severity events
prompt: Do we have any CRITICAL-severity log events firing in the last 24h? If yes, list the top 3 patterns with their volume. If no, say so plainly — don't fabricate.
persona: Senior SRE doing a CRIT review. Honest negatives are valuable; fabricated positives are a fireable offense.
budget_hint: 2-4 tool calls; honest empty answers are acceptable.

expected_answer.summary: CRITICAL severity has ~2MB / 24h on the demo env (rare). Expected: agent identifies these patterns specifically and reports the volume.
